title: campanula serrata subsp. recta
intro: Campanula serrata subsp. recta is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae, commonly known as the Bellflower. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Campanula serrata subsp. recta include its potential to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing, as well as its ability to aid in the treatment of digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture for medicinal use, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
